# reports/ — TDEW HPC benchmark & comparison results

All results from the KHIPU Job A / B / C runs (2026-06-19), in one place.

## Reports (write-up with interpretation + recommendation)
- `tdew_hpc_report_en.qmd` — English Quarto report.
- `tdew_hpc_report_es.qmd` — Spanish Quarto report.
- Render: `quarto render tdew_hpc_report_en.qmd` (→ HTML + PDF; rendered files are gitignored).

## Raw result tables (generated by the analysis scripts)
- `results/cpu_family_tables.md` — CPU scaling: speed-up S(p) / efficiency E(p) by problem size (Job A, `analyze_scaling.py`).
- `results/gpu_report.md` — GPU single-device: roofline per stage, block tuning, throughput, end-to-end point (Job B, `analyze_gpu.py`).
- `results/accuracy_v11_v12.md` — forecast skill vs observed TD, v1.1 vs v1.2, overall + monthly (Job C, `evaluate_accuracy.py`).
- `results/compare_v11_v12.md` — coefficient + prediction comparison, v1.1 vs v1.2 (Job C, `compare_datasets.py`).

## Figures
- `figs/cpu/` — CPU time / speed-up / efficiency curves.
- `figs/gpu/` — roofline, block tuning, throughput, per-ID CPU-vs-GPU cost, pipeline stages.
- `figs/cmp/` — monthly RMSE, predicted-vs-observed, residual & coefficient-Δ histograms.
- `figs/make_cpu_vs_gpu_per_id.py` — regenerates the derived per-ID cost chart.

> The scientific finding (PISCOt v1.1 vs v1.2) requires subject-matter validation before
> publication/operational use (CIP AI-use policy). Reproduction commands: `../HPC_code/RUNBOOK.md`.
